name: Potato Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons fresh dill or dill seed
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the unpeeled potatoes until tender, then drain.
2. Peel the potatoes and place them in a shallow buttered casserole dish.
3. Fry the onion in butter until golden brown. Add flour, stirring until it turns an ivory color.
4. Pour in the beef bouillon and light cream. Whisk together until creamy.
5. Stir in the parsley and dill. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Pour the mixture over the potatoes and sprinkle with grated cheddar cheese.
7. Bake at 450°F (230°C) for 15 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown on top. Serve.
